name: Donate CTA shows if app installed >=7 days ago @ios @high-risk @1-devices
description: Mocks a custom install date 7 days 2 minutes ago, opens the app, and verifies that the Donate CTA is shown.
descriptionHtml: Mocks a custom install date 7 days 2 minutes ago, opens the app, and verifies that the Donate CTA is shown.

Error: CTA heading is incorrect.
Expected: Please Read: A Personal Appeal From Cofounder of Session Chris McCabe
Actual: Our Final Appeal: Session is shutting down in 90 days
